title: Emerald Gearset
description: This mod adds an emerald variant of tools, weapons, and armor.
body:
## Emerald Gearset
Have you ever noticed that Minecraft is missing a variant of tools and armor for emeralds? This mod plans to introduce those missing variants.

### Features
Added Item:
- Emerald Upgrade Smithing Template

Added Tools/Weapons:
- Emerald Sword
- Emerald Spear (Mounts of Mayhem only)
- Emerald Axe
- Emerald Pickaxe
- Emerald Shovel
- Emerald Hoe

Added Armor:
- Emerald Horse Armor
- Emerald Nautilus Armor (Mounts of Mayhem only)
- Emerald Player Armor

Modified Loot Placements:
- The Emerald Upgrade Smithing Template can spawn in chests of Village Weaponsmiths, Toolsmiths, and Armorers and in the chests of Jungle Temples, Desert Pyramids, and Monster Rooms.
- Emerald Horse Armor can spawn in the chests of the Village Weaponsmith and Jungle Temples, Desert Pyramids, and Monster Rooms. (1.21.10 only)

Introduced Mechanics:
- Players can use the Emerald Upgrade Smithing Template, a Diamond Tool/Armor piece of their choice, and an Emerald to upgrade their Diamond Tools with this variant.
- Players can use the default Smithing Template duplication recipe, simply replacing the template with the Emerald Upgrade Smithing Template and the additional item slot with a Block of Emerald, to duplicate the Emerald Upgrade Smithing Template.

### Installation
1. Install the [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) for your selected version.
2. Download the corresponding version of the Mod from the [Versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/emerald-gearset/versions) page.
3. Download [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions).
4. Copy the Mod jars from where you downloaded them to the location of your mods folder.
5. Launch Minecraft and enjoy.
